user.title: gPlug Energy – Connection
user.description: Choose how to connect to your gPlug device.

mqtt.title: gPlug Energy – MQTT
mqtt.description:
Enter the MQTT sensor topic of your gPlug.
Typically: tele/<your-gplug-topic>/SENSOR
Check your gPlug web UI → Information for the correct topic.

http.title: gPlug Energy – HTTP
http.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your gPlug device.

error.invalid_topic: Invalid MQTT topic. Must contain at least one '/'.
error.invalid_host: Please enter a valid IP address or hostname.

abort.already_configured: This gPlug device is already configured.
